# The Web3 Wizard — Khalid Murtala

## About
Khalid Murtala (The Web3 Wizard) is a Product Engineer and Full-Stack Web3 Builder. He independently architects, builds, and ships production-grade Web3 × AI tools — from smart contracts and data pipelines to responsive UI.

## Social
- X / Twitter: https://twitter.com/theweb3wizard00
- GitHub: https://github.com/theweb3wizard
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/khalid-murtala
- Telegram: https://t.me/theweb3wizard00
- Discord: https://discord.com/users/theweb3wizard00
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/theweb3wizard00

## Featured Tools
- SolPulse: https://solpulse-hq.vercel.app — Real-time Solana memecoin whale tracker with Telegram alerts
- Valor: https://github.com/theweb3wizard/valor — Low-latency AI agents for on-chain trading execution
- TxPreview: https://github.com/theweb3wizard/txpreview — On-chain transaction security previewer
- SearchLens: https://searchlens-io.vercel.app — AI Overview Search Interception Scanner for SEO agencies

## All Tools
SolPulse, Valor, TxPreview, SearchLens, Write3, Conviction Collapse Detector, FlowForge, Grant-OS, ChainCard, WalletLens, OrderFlow, SolvFlow, Zenith — all listed at https://theweb3wizard.vercel.app
